title: The Legend of Zelda: Builders of the Realm
description: The Legend of Zelda Minecraft texture pack
body:
## Legend of Zelda - Minecraft

The pack is full of items from the greatest game of all time Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild

Optifine is require if played on Forge

[Cit Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) is required if played on Fabric
